blogs.description: Why production RAG fails: stale corpora, weak retrieval evals, context waste, and missing cost controls.

blogs.title: Model Routing for Cost Efficiency: A Practical Guide

comparisons.title: LiteLLM Alternative — LLM Cost + RAG Governance | ozDNA
comparisons.description: Compare LiteLLM vs ozDNA for vertical AI teams. Gateways route requests; ozDNA adds workflow cost control, RAG governance, and token economics.
comparisons.competitorStrengths: LiteLLM is a strong open-source proxy for multi-provider routing.
comparisons.ozdnaPositioning: ozDNA is built for teams shipping vertical AI products — where RAG reliability, token economics, and production margin matter as much as model failover.

comparisons.title: Portkey Alternative — ozDNA for Vertical AI Teams
comparisons.description: Compare Portkey vs ozDNA: gateways route requests; ozDNA adds RAG governance, token economics, and vertical AI proof.
comparisons.competitorStrengths: Portkey delivers polished gateway and observability for enterprise LLM integrations.
comparisons.ozdnaPositioning: ozDNA adds vertical RAG governance, workflow cost attribution, and token economics when you ship domain-specific AI products — not just route API calls.

comparisons.title: Helicone vs ozDNA — Observability vs Vertical AI Infrastructure
comparisons.description: Helicone vs ozDNA: observability vs full vertical AI stack — routing, RAG reliability, and production margin controls.
comparisons.competitorStrengths: Helicone excels at LLM observability — logging, tracing, and cost visibility across providers.
comparisons.ozdnaPositioning: ozDNA is vertical AI infrastructure: observability plus RAG operating layer, routing policy, and margin controls for production workflows.

comparisons.title: OpenRouter Alternative — ozDNA for Production Vertical AI
comparisons.description: OpenRouter alternative: multi-model access plus vertical RAG governance and cost optimization for AI SaaS teams.
comparisons.competitorStrengths: OpenRouter offers easy multi-model access through a unified model marketplace.
comparisons.ozdnaPositioning: ozDNA goes beyond model access — production RAG, workflow-level cost control, and vertical corpora for teams shipping AI SaaS.

pillars.title: LLM Cost Optimization & Routing
pillars.h1:
Control token burn
before it becomes structural
pillars.keywords: LLM cost optimization, LLM routing, AI inference cost reduction
pillars.description: LLM cost optimization and model routing for vertical AI teams — measure workflow cost, route to capable models, and protect gross margin before API bills become structural.
pillars.lead: LLM gateways route requests. Vertical AI teams need more: workflow-level cost attribution, routing policies that pick the cheapest capable model per step, and margin guardrails before inference spend compounds with every active user.

problemCards.title: No workflow attribution
problemCards.body: You see total API spend, not cost per detection, per report, per RAG query. Optimization is guesswork.

problemCards.title: Routing as afterthought
problemCards.body: Model selection lives in app code. Failover upgrades models without finance knowing.

problemCards.title: Margin blind spots
problemCards.body: User-facing credits decouple from real inference cost. Gross margin erodes before dashboards catch it.

capabilityCards.title: Workflow-level attribution
capabilityCards.body: Map tokens and dollars to named workflows — detection, retrieval, generation, re-ranking — not just API keys.

capabilityCards.title: Cheapest capable model routing
capabilityCards.body: LLM routing policies per vertical step: which model clears your quality bar at lowest cost and acceptable latency?

capabilityCards.title: Margin guardrails
capabilityCards.body: Tie user credits to real spend. Alert and throttle before a single workflow destroys unit economics.

pillars.title: Production RAG Reliability
pillars.description: Production RAG reliability: ingestion freshness, hybrid retrieval, eval coverage, and governance in one operating layer.

pillars.title: Vertical AI Infrastructure
pillars.description: Vertical AI infrastructure for teams shipping domain-specific agents with workflow depth and production proof.

pillars.title: Post-Subsidy Margin Resilience
pillars.keywords: AI inference cost reduction, AI margin optimization
pillars.description: Protect gross margin in AI-native SaaS when LLM API pricing and subsidies change.

pillars.title: Tokenomics & Pricing Design
pillars.h1:
Credits that map
to real LLM spend
pillars.description: Token cost management and pricing design — connect user credits to workflow-level inference consumption.
